channel.title: Intro on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Intro on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Setting the Bar for 2018
item.description: This new blog has a single purpose: To document my attempt to deploy a neural netowrk in order to ethically address at least one issue of faced by juvenile justice professionals and justice involved youth by December, 2018. My name is Marty, and I have been a Cook County Juvenile Probation Officer for over seventeen years 1. Being an officer is not just a job for me. It is a vocation, a calling.
